title: Karlous Miller at Helium Comedy Club
location: Helium Comedy Club, 3070 Windward Plaza, Alpharetta, GA
price: Couple's Package: 2 premium seats + $90 food & beverage credit
description: 85 South / Wild 'N Out favorite Karlous Miller in an intimate showroom — the venue literally sells a Couple's Package with reserved seating and a $90 F&B credit. Premium, no-stress date night with a guaranteed laugh.

title: R&B Singers Phillippia and Yoshi — Dinner & a Show
description: Intimate R&B double-bill built for couples — order dinner, then settle in for two hours of soulful vocals at a candlelit venue. The whole night is designed as a 'dinner and a show' date.

title: Reggae After Dark — Free Entry + Drink Until 11PM
price: FREE entry; free drink until 11 PM
description: Late-night reggae social with free cocktails to kick things off — dancing, DJs, and Caribbean energy until 3 AM. Perfect 'start the night late' option that costs nothing to get in.

title: Midsummer Market at Wild Heaven West End
location: Wild Heaven Beer: West End Brewery & Gardens, Atlanta, GA
description: Daytime market at one of Atlanta's prettiest brewery gardens — local makers, food vendors, and craft beer on the lawn. Easy, breezy Saturday afternoon date with plenty to wander and snack on.

title: Lionel Richie & Earth, Wind & Fire — Sing A Song All Night Long
description: Two absolute legends of R&B and funk on one stage — basically a 3-hour slow-jam and dance-party hybrid. A once-in-a-generation lineup for couples who grew up on this catalog.

title: INNER VIEWS Art Exhibition Opening
description: Group show of fourteen contemporary artists musing on home, family, and community. A calm, conversation-friendly date — wander, find the piece you can't stop looking at, and talk about it over coffee after.

title: Mambo Mayhem — Atlanta Latin Dance Social
description: Salsa/bachata social with a real dance floor and DJ — beginner-friendly vibe where couples can take a quick lesson, then dance the night away. One of the best 'learn something new together' date options in the city.

title: Garage Gluten Freedom — Wood-Fired Pizza & Beer
description: Two days of gluten-free wood-fired pizza paired with Monday Night brews — perfect for the gluten-conscious couple (or anyone who just loves pizza + beer on a patio). Casual, shareable, and zero pretense.

title: Afro Caribbean vs Hip Hop & R&B at Embr Lounge
time: Evening (free entry until midnight w/ RSVP)
price: Free entry until midnight with RSVP
description: Indoor + outdoor Afro-Caribbean party with food and drink specials — DJs spinning Afro beats, dancehall, hip-hop, and R&B. Great 'free-to-get-in, stay-all-night' Thursday date.

title: Dustin Ross — Live at City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 North Ave NE, Atlanta, GA
description: Comedian Dustin Ross in the intimate, table-service City Winery setting — wine, dinner, and sharp stand-up in one ticket. Easy, date-friendly comedy night with a built-in food/wine component.

title: PHYSIQUE 2026 — Opening Reception at Kai Lin Art
price: Free and open to the public
description: Kai Lin Art's first-ever juried exhibition opens with a Friday-night reception — meet the artists, sip wine, and preview a fresh summer show. Free, low-key, and one of Atlanta's best art-world mingling dates.

title: Atlanta Midsummer Food Truck Alley
location: The Georgia Freight Depot, Atlanta, GA
price: Free entry; food priced per truck
description: Three-day food truck festival downtown — share small plates from a dozen+ vendors and pick a favorite together. A perfect Saturday-afternoon sampler date with no reservations needed.

title: Ink Studded Vegan Fest
location: 1879 S Stone Mountain Lithonia Rd, Lithonia, GA
description: Plant-based food festival meets tattoo culture — vendors, vegan eats, and live energy. A quirky, off-the-beaten-path Saturday for couples who like their dates a little different.

title: Dinner and a Date: A Night of Soul — Live Music Show
location: Apache XLR, 393 Marietta St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Sunday-night soul showcase inside one of ATL's most intimate live-music rooms — dinner + set, dim lights, and an artist lineup curated for grown-up date energy.

title: Rooftop Salsa & Bachata Social
description: Sunday salsa/bachata social with city views — beginner lesson first, open floor after. Sweaty, smiling, and one of the best 'we're leaving better dancers than we came' date options of the week.

title: Sun Havana Nights — Salsa/Bachata Class, Food & Latin Dancing
description: Sunday salsa-and-food combo — class, dinner, and a social all in one ticket. A full date arc in a single event: learn together, eat together, dance together.

title: Jazz Affair — Live Jazz Night
location: Apache XLR, 393 Marietta St NW, Atlanta, GA
description: Mid-week jazz date night — candlelit, intimate, and explicitly built around couples dining and listening. Wednesday is the perfect 'we don't need a reason' escape from the work week.

title: A FINE LINE — Opening Reception at Spalding Nix Fine Art
location: Spalding Nix Fine Art, Atlanta, GA
description: Four-artist group show opening with wine and mingling — Kate Hooray Osmond, Nancy Talero, Shannon Davis, and Laura Dargan share the walls. Free, elegant, and a great excuse to dress up on a Wednesday.

title: Funny Bachelors: Comics Riff on Blind Dates
description: Comedians literally crashing a live dating show — blind dates, real reactions, and punchlines. A genuinely funny twist on the comedy-date format that's built for couples who like interactive shows.
